page_content:
MATH341 Multivariable Calculus, Linear Algebra, Differential Equations II (Honors) (4 Credits)

A continuation of MATH340.

Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in MATH340.

Restriction: Open to second semester Freshmen only.

Credit Only Granted for. MATH240, MATH246, MATH341 or MATH461.

MATH386 Experiential Learning (3-6 Credits) Prerequisite: Must have learning proposal approved by the CMNS Mathematics Department.
